text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, November 17. No work meetings today. You have working on the garage cabinetry and Sarah wanting to work on her design course.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: The smart-home hub is acting up today. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Let's get that resolved. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. It was a really interesting history episode. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. I've adjusted the local settings. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. That sounds like a sweet moment. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Hosted a game night at our place. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. Social breaks are great. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Busy day for sports! I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Prepping school lunches for the week. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. I've got the grocery list ready. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: The kitchen sink area has a problem. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Automations are great when they work. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. It was a really interesting history episode. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Good way to wrap up the day. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Screen time is always a negotiation. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Modified the smart-home alert integrations. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. I've indexed the research notes. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Having dinner with our friends tonight. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Neighborhood connections are fun. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. That's a big step. That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Putting together our grocery list. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Healthy choices are great. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
